title: theobroma cacao subsp. sphaerocarpum
intro: Theobroma cacao subsp. sphaerocarpum is a wild subspecies of cacao tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its spherical fruit and high concentration of theobromine. The medicinal properties of Theobroma cacao subsp. sphaerocarpum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of this plant include improved heart health, reduced risk of certain diseases such as cancer and type 2 diabetes, and enhanced cognitive function. The herbal preparations of Theobroma cacao subsp. sphaerocarpum include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
